result.finding: Spring Boot application with embedded Tomcat 10.1.x (Servlet API 6.0 / Jakarta EE 10) via spring-boot-starter-web. JAR packaging with embedded container — no external application server required.
evidence: pom.xml: spring-boot-starter-web (Spring Boot 3.3.2) — includes tomcat-embed-core 10.1.x by default
pom.xml: No explicit servlet-api dependency (Spring Boot manages it via BOM)
pom.xml: No <packaging>war</packaging> — defaults to JAR (embedded container deployment)
No web.xml found (Spring Boot uses auto-configuration instead)
No container-specific files found (no weblogic.xml, jboss-web.xml, etc.)
No @WebServlet or @WebFilter annotations — uses Spring MVC @Controller pattern
Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE namespace (jakarta.servlet.*) not legacy javax.servlet.*
values: Container: Embedded Apache Tomcat 10.1.x (managed by Spring Boot 3.3.2)
Deployment model: Embedded JAR (self-contained runnable jar)
Servlets/Filters: 0 (uses Spring MVC DispatcherServlet via auto-configuration)
